title: Hooks & Webs - Toffy's Hooks Addon
description: Spider-Man web chains with invisible hooks and climbing boots
body: This addon is really cool because it turns your gear into a superhero toolkit. It gets rid of the chain and replaces it with a new kind of webbing that is strong and looks like the webs that Spider-Man shoots. The grappling hook and special boots that help you climb walls are not visible. It looks like you are swinging around and sticking to walls with your bare hands. This addon is like something a superhero would use it makes you feel like you have superpowers. The webbing is, like Spider-Mans web-shooters it is a neat thing to have. Whether you are performing acrobatic maneuvers or scaling skyscrapers, this modification ensures your movement looks seamless, fluid, and authentically heroic without bulky equipment cluttering your character model.
